titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Thomas C. Wilson, Class of 1929, Sheffield Scientific School, Yale University, Photographs of Yale
Wilson (Thomas Cluff), Class of 1929, Sheffield Scientific School, Yale University, Photographs of Yale
titlestmt.author: compiled by Christine Connolly

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:43

did.unittitle: Thomas C. Wilson, Class of 1929, Sheffield Scientific School, Yale University, Photographs of Yale
did.abstract: The materials consist of photographs of Yale University taken by Thomas C. Wilson. Includes "snapshots of the Yale scene" and photographs of Yale buildings.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 46-A (YRG 46-A), Records and materials broadly documenting Yale buildings, facilities, and grounds.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Thomas C. Wilson, Class of 1929, Sheffield Scientific School, Yale University, Photographs of Yale (RU 636). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of photographs of Yale University taken by Thomas C. Wilson. Includes "snapshots of the Yale scene" and photographs of Yale buildings.

did.unittitle: Gate between Art School and Library
Harkness Tower from the Old Campus
Sheff Town - corner of Wall and College Streets
One of the courts in Harkness
Byers Hall, Van-Sheff, St. Anthony, and Woolsey Hall from Prospect Street
Chittenden and Harkness through Phelps Archway
Sachem Hall, Prospect Street (Phi Sigma Kappa Fraternity)
Front hall, Sachem Hall, Prospect Street
